m13913.plot: The well-known explorer and hunter Captain Spaulding has just returned from Africa, and is being welcomed home with a lavish party at the estate of influential society matron Mrs.

m303.title: Notorious (1946)
m303.tagline: Deep their love! Great the risk!
m303.plot: In order to help bring Nazis to justice, U.S.

m212.plot: Mortimer Brewster, a newspaper drama critic, playwright, and author known for his diatribes against marriage, suddenly falls in love and gets married;  but when he makes a quick trip home to tell his two maiden aunts, he

m976.title: Sweet Smell of Success
m976.plot: New York City newspaper writer J.J.

m935.plot: After the insane General Jack D.

m11697.plot: Questions arise when Senator Stoddard attends the funeral of a local man named Tom Doniphon in a small Western town.

m907.plot: The life of a Russian physician and poet who, although married to another, falls in love with a political activist's wife and experiences hardship during World War I and then the October Revolution.

m11645.title: Ran

m11645.plot: Shakespeare's King Lear is reimagined as a singular historical epic set in sixteenth-century Japan where an aging warlord divides his kingdom between his three sons.

m11953.title: Kagemusha
m11953.tagline: The Shadow of a man can never stand up and walk on its own.
m11953.plot: Akira Kurosawa's lauded feudal epic presents the tale of a petty thief who is recruited to impersonate Shingen, an aging warlord, in order to avoid attacks by competing clans.

m12516.title: Dreams
m12516.tagline: The past, present, and future. The thoughts and images of one man... for all men. One man's dreams... for every dreamer.
m12516.plot: Eight visually rich vignettes drawn from Kurosawa’s own dreams—fox weddings and vanished orchards, a soldier’s ghosts, a walk through Van Gogh’s canvases, nuclear nightmares, and a water-mill utopia—meditate on childhood

m9764.title: Dersu Uzala
m9764.tagline: There is man and beast at nature's mercy. There is awe and love and reverence. And there is the man called...
m9764.plot: A military explorer meets and befriends a Goldi man in Russia’s unmapped forests.

m993.title: Sleuth (1972)
m993.tagline: Think of the perfect crime... Then go one step further.
m993.plot: A man who loves games and theatre invites his wife's lover to meet, setting up a battle of wits with potentially deadly results.

m6619.title: Death in Venice
m6619.tagline: The celebrated story of a man obsessed with ideal beauty.
m6619.plot: Composer Gustav von Aschenbach travels to Venice for health reasons.

m8422.title: Rocco and His Brothers
m8422.tagline: DARING in its realism. STUNNING in its impact. BREATHTAKING in its scope.
m8422.plot: When a impoverished widow’s family moves to the big city, two of her five sons become romantic rivals with deadly results.

m10238.title: Cries and Whispers
m10238.tagline: Four women dressed in white in a mansion painted red... haunted by whispers and cries.
m10238.plot: As Agnes slowly dies of cancer, her sisters are so immersed in their own psychic pains that they are unable to offer her the support she needs.

m11506.title: The Silence
m11506.tagline: BERGMAN at his most POWERFUL! SHOCKING! BOLD!
m11506.plot: Traveling through an unnamed European country on the brink of war, sickly, intellectual Ester, her sister Anna and Anna's young son, Johan, check into a near-empty hotel.

m12761.title: Autumn Sonata
m12761.plot: After a seven-year absence, Charlotte Andergast travels to Sweden to reunite with her daughter Eva.

m29455.title: Winter Light
m29455.plot: A Swedish pastor fails a loving woman, a suicidal fisherman and God.

m18333.title: Hour of the Wolf
m18333.tagline: The hour of the wolf is the hour between night and dawn. It is the hour when most people die, when sleep is the deepest, when nightmares feel most real.
m18333.plot: While vacationing on a remote German island with his younger pregnant wife, an artist has an emotional breakdown while confronting his repressed desires.

m133919.title: Scenes from a Marriage
m133919.plot: Johan and Marianne are married and seem to have it all.

m5961.title: Fanny and Alexander
m5961.plot: As children in the loving Ekdahl family, Fanny and Alexander enjoy a happy life with their parents, who run a theater company.

m11602.title: Through a Glass Darkly
m11602.plot: Karin hopes to recover from her recent stay at a mental hospital by spending the summer at her family's cottage on a tiny island.

m255.title: Stolen Kisses
m255.tagline: Antoine knows what he wants to do ... his problem is doing it.
m255.plot: The third in a series of films featuring François Truffaut's alter-ego, Antoine Doinel, the story resumes with Antoine being discharged from military service.

m1675.title: Day for Night
m1675.tagline: A movie for people who love movies.
m1675.plot: A committed filmmaker struggles to complete his latest project while coping with a myriad of crises, personal and professional, among the cast and crew.

m1716.title: The Last Metro
m1716.tagline: A story of love and conflict.
m1716.plot: In occupied Paris, an actress wed to a Jewish theater owner must keep him hidden from the Nazis while doing both of their jobs.

m1818.title: Shoot the Piano Player
m1818.tagline: François Truffaut, Brilliant Director Who Gave You the Award Winning "The 400 Blows", Now Brings to the Screen a Fascinating New Work That Plays in Many Keys...All of Them Delightful!
m1818.plot: Charlie is a former classical pianist who has changed his name and now plays jazz in a grimy Paris bar.

m874.title: A Man for All Seasons
m874.plot: A depiction of the conflict between King Henry VIII of England and his Lord Chancellor, Sir Thomas More, who refuses to swear the Oath of Supremacy declaring Henry Supreme Head of the Church in England.

m4909.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
m4909.tagline: Nameless, faceless... relentlessly moving towards the date with death that would rock the world.
m4909.plot: An international assassin known as ‘The Jackal’ is employed by disgruntled French generals to kill President Charles de Gaulle, with a dedicated gendarme on the assassin’s trail.

m10514.title: The Andromeda Strain
m10514.tagline: The picture runs 130 minutes... The story covers 96 of the most critical hours in man's history... The suspense will last through your lifetime!
m10514.plot: When virtually all of the residents of Piedmont, New Mexico are found dead after the return to Earth of a space satellite, the head of the US Air Force's Project Scoop declares an emergency.

m31906.title: The Beguiled (1971)
m31906.plot: Offbeat Civil War drama in which a wounded Yankee soldier, after finding refuge in an isolated girls' school in the South towards the end of the war, becomes the object of the young women's sexual fantasies.

m2161.title: Fantastic Voyage
m2161.tagline: A Fantastic and Spectacular Voyage... Through the Human Body... Into the Brain.
m2161.plot: In order to save an assassinated scientist, a submarine and its crew are shrunk to microscopic size and injected into his bloodstream.

m11165.title: Tora! Tora! Tora!
m11165.tagline: The incredible attack on Pearl Harbor.
m11165.plot: In the summer of 1941, the United States and Japan seem on the brink of war after constant embargos and failed diplomacy come to no end.

m9610.title: Conan the Destroyer
m9610.tagline: The most powerful legend of all is back in a new adventure.
m9610.plot: Conan is commissioned by the evil queen Taramis to safely escort a teen princess and her powerful bodyguard to a far away castle to retrieve the magic Horn of Dagoth.

m9626.title: Red Sonja
m9626.tagline: A woman and a warrior that became a legend.
m9626.plot: The tyrant Gedren seeks the total power in a world of barbarism.

m4024.title: Last Year at Marienbad
m4024.plot: At a weekend gathering, a man tells a woman that they had spent time there together a year prior.

m10227.title: PlayTime
m10227.plot: Clumsy Monsieur Hulot finds himself perplexed by the intimidating complexity of a gadget-filled Paris.

m20108.title: Au Hasard Balthazar
m20108.plot: The story of a donkey Balthazar as he is passed from owner to owner, some kind and some cruel but all with motivations beyond his understanding.

m12707.title: Orca
m12707.plot: After witnessing the killing of his mate and offspring at the hands of a reckless Irish captain, a vengeful killer whale rampages through the fisherman's Newfoundland harbor.

m10869.title: Herbie Rides Again
m10869.tagline: The Loveable Bug's back doin' his thing!
m10869.plot: The living Volkswagen Beetle helps an old lady protect her home from a corrupt developer.

m14136.title: The Love Bug
m14136.tagline: Herbie will honk his way into your heart.
m14136.plot: Down-on-his-luck race car driver Jim Douglas teams up with a little VW Bug that has a mind of its own, not realizing Herbie's worth until a sneaky rival plots to steal him.

m1594.title: A Shot in the Dark
m1594.tagline: …the picture that gets away with murder!
m1594.plot: Inspector Jacques Clouseau, smitten with the accused maid Maria Gambrelli, unwittingly turns a straightforward murder investigation into a comedic series of mishaps, testing the patience of his irritable boss Charles Dre

m918.title: Blind Date
m918.tagline: A date with her is every man's dream come true. And with dreams like her - who needs nightmares?
m918.plot: When bachelor Walter Davis is set up with his sister-in-law's pretty cousin, Nadia Gates, a seemingly average blind date turns into a chaotic night on the town.

m6081.title: Revenge of the Pink Panther
m6081.tagline: Just when you thought it was safe to go back to the movies.
m6081.plot: Chief Inspector Jacques Clouseau is dead.

m11843.title: The Return of the Pink Panther
m11843.plot: The famous Pink Panther jewel has once again been stolen and Inspector Clouseau is called in to catch the thief.

m12268.title: The Pink Panther Strikes Again
m12268.tagline: Why are the world's chief assassins after Inspector Clouseau? Why not? Everybody else is.
m12268.plot: Charles Dreyfus, who has finally cracked over inspector Clouseau's antics, escapes from a mental institution and launches an elaborate plan to get rid of Clouseau once and for all.

m12614.title: Victor/Victoria
m12614.tagline: The disguise surprise comedy of the year!
m12614.plot: A struggling female soprano finds work playing a male female impersonator, but it complicates her personal life.

m9660.title: Operation Petticoat
m9660.plot: A World War II submarine commander finds himself stuck with a damaged sub, a con-man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

m11206.title: Wait Until Dark
m11206.tagline: A blind woman plays a deadly game of survival.
m11206.plot: After a flight back home, Sam Hendrix returns with a doll he innocently acquired along the way.

m4193.title: Evil Under the Sun
m4193.tagline: Evil is everywhere. Even in paradise.
m4193.plot: An opulent beach resort provides a scenic background to this amusing whodunit as Poirot attempts to uncover the nefarious evildoer behind the strangling of a notorious stage star.

m16241.title: The Boys from Brazil
m16241.plot: Nazi hunter Ezra Lieberman discovers a sinister and bizarre plot, masterminded by Dr.

m2288.title: Closer
m2288.tagline: If you believe in love at first sight, you never stop looking.
m2288.plot: The relationships of two couples become complicated and deceitful when the man from one couple meets the woman of the other.

m10395.title: Wolf
m10395.plot: An aging publisher becomes a demon wolf and, with this newfound youthful vigor, fights to keep his job.

m3525.title: Working Girl
m3525.tagline: For anyone who's ever won. For anyone who's ever lost. And for everyone who's still in there trying.
m3525.plot: When a secretary's idea is stolen by her boss, she takes a risky chance to reclaim it by impersonating him and running the project from his position.

m11000.title: The Birdcage
m11000.plot: A gay cabaret owner and his drag queen partner agree to put up a false heterosexual front so that their son can introduce them to his fiancée's conservative parents.

m11364.title: Regarding Henry
m11364.tagline: The story of a man who had everything, but found something more.
m11364.plot: After being shot, a lawyer loses his memory and must relearn speech and mobility, but he has a loving family to support him.

m6538.title: Charlie Wilson's War
m6538.tagline: A stiff drink. A little mascara. A lot of nerve. Who said they couldn't bring down the Soviet empire.
m6538.plot: A Texas congressman sets a series of events in motion when he conspires with a CIA operative to aid Afghan mujahideen rebels fighting the Soviets.

m14881.title: Joe Kidd
m14881.tagline: If you're looking for trouble...he's Joe Kidd.
m14881.plot: A band of Mexicans find their U.

m10349.title: The Dark Half
m10349.tagline: There are very good reasons to be afraid of the dark.
m10349.plot: Following the public's realization that Thad Beaumont and George Stark are one and the same, the former stages a mock funeral, only for a series of gruesome murders to begin occurring as in his books.

m11683.title: Land of the Dead
m11683.tagline: The dead shall inherit the Earth.
m11683.plot: The living dead have taken over the world, and the remaining humans live in a walled city to protect themselves as they cope with the situation.

m8408.title: Day of the Dead
m8408.tagline: The darkest day of horror the world has ever known!
m8408.plot: As the world is overrun by zombies, scientists and military personnel in an underground Florida bunker must decide on how they should deal with the undead.

m13025.title: Diary of the Dead
m13025.tagline: Where will you be when the end begins?
m13025.plot: A group of young filmmakers encounter real zombies while filming a horror movie of their own.

m29425.title: The Crazies
m29425.tagline: Why are the good people dying?
m29425.plot: The military attempts to contain a manmade virus causing death and permanent insanity in those infected, as it overtakes a small Pennsylvania town.

m29426.title: Survival of the Dead
m29426.tagline: Death isn't what it used to be.
m29426.plot: Off the coast of North America, locals simultaneously fight a zombie epidemic while hoping for a cure to revert their undead relatives back to normal.

m16281.title: Creepshow
m16281.tagline: The most fun you'll ever have BEING SCARED!
m16281.plot: Five grisly tales from a 1950s-style comic, including a murdered father rising from beyond, a bizarre meteor, a vengeful husband, a mysterious crate's occupant, and a plague of cockroaches.

m11590.title: Slap Shot
m11590.tagline: Slap Shot out slaps... out swears... out laughs...
m11590.plot: To build up attendance at their games, the management of a struggling minor-league hockey team signs up the Hanson Brothers, three hard-charging players whose job is to demolish the opposition.

m4710.title: Masculin Féminin
m4710.tagline: Jean-Luc Godard's Swinging Look at Youth and Love in Paris Today!
m4710.plot: Paul, a young idealist trying to figure out what he wants to do with his life, takes a job interviewing people for a marketing research firm.

m8072.title: Alphaville
m8072.orig: Alphaville, une étrange aventure de Lemmy Caution
m8072.tagline: Suddenly the word is Alphaville... and a secret agent is in a breathless race against the Masters of the Future.
m8072.plot: Lemmy Caution is on a mission to eliminate Professor Von Braun, the creator of a malevolent computer that rules the city of Alphaville.

m8073.title: Band of Outsiders
m8073.tagline: A Who-Dunit, Who's Got-It, Where-Is-It-Now Wild One From That "Breathless" director Jean-Luc Godard!
m8073.plot: Cinephile slackers Franz and Arthur spend their days mimicking the antiheroes of Hollywood noirs and Westerns while pursuing the lovely Odile.

m31522.title: A Woman Is a Woman
m31522.tagline: Is this a tragedy or a comedy? Either way, it's a masterpiece.
m31522.plot: Longing for a baby, a stripper pursues another man in order to make her boyfriend jealous.

m1623.title: Brubaker
m1623.tagline: One man against a cruel system.
m1623.plot: The new warden of a small prison farm in Arkansas tries to clean it up of corruption after initially posing as an inmate.

m2990.title: Pacific Heights
m2990.tagline: They were the perfect couple, buying the perfect house. Until a perfect stranger moved into their lives.
m2990.plot: A couple works hard to renovate their dream house and become landlords to pay for it.

m17182.title: Eye for an Eye
m17182.tagline: What do you do when justice fails?
m17182.plot: It's fire and brimstone time as grieving mother Karen McCann takes justice into her own hands when a kangaroo court in Los Angeles fails to convict Robert Doob, the monster who raped and murdered her 17-year-old daughter

m14257.title: Delusions of Grandeur
m14257.plot: Don Sallust is the minister of the King of Spain.

m2998.title: Zabriskie Point
m2998.tagline: How you get there depends on where you're at.
m2998.plot: Anthropology student Daria, who's helping a property developer build a village in the Los Angeles desert, and dropout Mark, who's wanted by the authorities for allegedly killing a policeman during a student riot, acciden

m21135.title: L'Eclisse
m21135.tagline: The ache and ecstasy of love…
m21135.plot: Vittoria is a beautiful literary translator living in Rome.

m26638.title: Red Desert
m26638.tagline: This is the story of a woman… Her hidden thirsts and hungers…
m26638.plot: In an industrializing Italian town, a married woman, rendered mentally unstable after a traffic accident, drifts into an affair with a friend of her husband.

m9652.title: The Passenger
m9652.tagline: I used to be somebody else...but I traded him in.
m9652.plot: David Locke is a world-weary American journalist who has been sent to cover a conflict in northern Africa, but he makes little progress with the story.

m10839.title: Cross of Iron
m10839.tagline: On the Eastern front in 1943, the German soldiers no longer had any ideals. They were not fighting for the Party—but for their lives!
m10839.plot: It is 1943, and the German army—ravaged and demoralised—is hastily retreating from the Russian front.

m5916.title: The Getaway
m5916.tagline: It takes two to make it … The big two.
m5916.plot: A recently released ex-convict and his loyal wife go on the run after a heist goes wrong.

m11942.title: Bring Me the Head of Alfredo Garcia
m11942.tagline: Why is his head worth one million dollars and the lives of 21 people?
m11942.plot: An American bartender and his prostitute girlfriend go on a road trip through the Mexican underworld to collect a $1 million bounty on the head of a dead gigolo.

m9584.title: Convoy
m9584.tagline: Ain't nothin' gonna get in their way!
m9584.plot: Trucker Rubber Duck and his buddies Pig Pen, Widow Woman and Spider Mike use their CB radios to warn one another of the presence of cops.

m18030.title: Kiss Me Deadly
m18030.tagline: Blood red kisses! White hot thrills! Mickey Spillane’s latest H-bomb!
m18030.plot: One evening, Hammer gives a ride to Christina, an attractive hitchhiker on a lonely country road, who has escaped from the nearby lunatic asylum.

m11657.title: Le Cercle Rouge
m11657.tagline: No place to hide . . . nowhere to run . . .
m11657.plot: When French criminal Corey gets released from prison, he resolves to never return.

m11367.title: Odds and Evens
m11367.tagline: The most unlikely pair ever to take on the mob!
m11367.plot: A bumbling government agent recruits a trucker whose gambling knowledge can help crack an illegal Florida operation.

m6399.title: Who Finds a Friend Finds a Treasure
m6399.orig: Chi trova un amico trova un tesoro
m6399.plot: Alan gets a map to some war treasure which the Japanese army left behind on a small Pacific island at the end of World War II.

m1908.title: Inherit the Wind
m1908.tagline: It’s all about the fabulous “Monkey Trial” that rocked America!
m1908.plot: Schoolteacher Bertram Cates is arrested for teaching his students Darwin's theory of evolution.

m1394.title: Nostalgia
m1394.plot: Russian poet Andrei Gorchakov journeys through Italy with his interpreter Eugenia to research the life of an 18th-century Russian composer who once lived abroad.

m24657.title: The Sacrifice
m24657.tagline: The final film of Andrei Tarkovsky
m24657.plot: Alexander, a journalist, philosopher and retired actor, celebrates a birthday with friends and family when it is announced that nuclear war has begun.

m10156.title: History of the World: Part I
m10156.tagline: Ten million years in the making. The truth, the whole truth, and everything, but the truth!
m10156.plot: An uproarious version of history that proves nothing is sacred – not even the Roman Empire, the French Revolution and the Spanish Inquisition.

m8005.title: Robin Hood: Men in Tights
m8005.plot: Robin Hood comes home after fighting in the Crusades to learn that the noble King Richard is in exile and that the despotic King John now rules England, with the help of the Sheriff of Rottingham.

m12110.title: Dracula: Dead and Loving It
m12110.tagline: You'll laugh until you die...then you'll rise from the dead and laugh again!
m12110.plot: When a lawyer shows up at the vampire's doorstep, he falls prey to his charms and joins him in his search for fresh blood.

m12535.title: High Anxiety
m12535.tagline: Danger, intrigue, romance...and a touch of kinkiness!
m12535.plot: A psychiatrist with intense acrophobia (fear of heights) goes to work for a mental institution run by doctors who appear to be crazier than their patients, and have secrets that they are willing to commit murder to keep.

m11349.title: Cape Fear (1962)
m11349.tagline: Now he had only one weapon left—murder!
m11349.plot: Sam Bowden witnesses a rape committed by Max Cady and testifies against him.

m9838.title: King Solomon's Mines
m9838.tagline: An action packed adventure, full of laughs and heroics.
m9838.plot: Ever in search of adventure, explorer Allan Quatermain agrees to join the beautiful Jesse Huston on a mission to locate her archaeologist father, who has been abducted for his knowledge of the legendary mines of King Sol

m19997.title: Niagara
m19997.tagline: A raging torrent of emotion that even nature can't control!
m19997.plot: Rose Loomis and her older, gloomier husband, George, are vacationing at a cabin in Niagara Falls.

m9531.title: Superman III
m9531.tagline: If the world's most powerful computer can control even Superman...no one on earth is safe.
m9531.plot: Aiming to defeat the Man of Steel, wealthy executive Ross Webster hires bumbling but brilliant Gus Gorman to develop synthetic kryptonite, which yields some unexpected psychological effects.

m4543.title: Monty Python's The Meaning of Life
m4543.tagline: It took God six days to create the heavens and the earth...and Monty Python ninety minutes to screw it up.
m4543.plot: Life's questions are 'answered' in a series of outrageous vignettes, beginning with a staid London insurance company which transforms before our eyes into a pirate ship.

m86828.title: Absolutely Anything
m86828.plot: Eccentric aliens give a man the power to do anything he wants to determine if Earth is worth saving.

m526.title: Ladyhawke
m526.tagline: No force in Heaven will release them. No power on Earth can save them.
m526.plot: Captain Etienne Navarre is a man on whose shoulders lies a cruel curse.

m943.title: Lethal Weapon 3
m943.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh pursue a former officer who uses his knowledge of police procedure and policies to steal and sell confiscated guns and ammunition to local street gangs.

m944.title: Lethal Weapon 4
m944.plot: With personal crises and age weighing in on them, LAPD officers Riggs and Murtaugh must contend with a deadly Chinese crime lord trying to get his brother out of prison.

m2207.title: 16 Blocks
m2207.plot: An aging cop is assigned the ordinary task of escorting a fast-talking witness from police custody to a courthouse, but they find themselves running the gauntlet as other forces try to prevent them from getting there.

m8834.title: Conspiracy Theory
m8834.tagline: What if your most paranoid nightmares had just come true?
m8834.plot: A man obsessed with conspiracy theories becomes a target after one of his theories turns out to be true.

m9691.title: Assassins
m9691.tagline: In the shadows of life. In the business of death. One man found a reason to live.
m9691.plot: Assassin Robert Rath arrives at a funeral to kill a prominent mobster, only to witness a rival hired gun complete the job for him -- with grisly results.

m9562.title: Timeline
m9562.tagline: They had to travel into the past to save the future
m9562.plot: A group of archaeological students become trapped in the past when they go there to retrieve their professor.

m9647.title: Scrooged
m9647.tagline: The spirits will move you in odd and hysterical ways.
m9647.plot: Frank Cross is a wildly successful television executive whose cold ambition and curmudgeonly nature has driven away the love of his life.

m11954.title: Lifeforce
m11954.tagline: In the blink of an eye, the terror begins.
m11954.plot: A race of space vampires arrives in London and infects the populace, commencing an apocalyptic descent into chaos.

m13555.title: The Funhouse
m13555.tagline: Pay to get in. Pray to get out!
m13555.plot: Rebellious teen Amy defies her parents by going to a trashy carnival that has pulled into town.

m16337.title: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre 2
m16337.tagline: After a decade of silence... the buzzz is back.
m16337.plot: A radio host is victimised by the notorious cannibal family while a former Texas Marshal hunts them.

m20345.title: The Bird with the Crystal Plumage
m20345.tagline: All the screaming in the world won't help!
m20345.plot: An American writer living in Rome witnesses an attempted murder that is connected to an ongoing killing spree in the city and conducts his own investigation, despite him and his girlfriend being targeted by the killer.

m30689.title: Four Flies on Grey Velvet
m30689.tagline: When the flies start to crawl, so will your flesh...
m30689.plot: Roberto, a drummer in a rock band, keeps receiving weird phone calls and being followed by a mysterious man.

m27431.title: The Cat o' Nine Tails
m27431.tagline: Caught between the truth and a murderer's hand!
m27431.plot: A newsman works with a blind puzzle-solver to uncover a deadly conspiracy linked to a genetic research facility.

m29161.title: Phenomena
m29161.tagline: Jennifer has a few million close friends. She's going to need them all!
m29161.plot: A young girl, with an amazing ability to communicate with insects, is transferred to an exclusive Swiss boarding school, where her unusual capability might help solve a string of murders.

m15206.title: The Mother of Tears
m15206.tagline: What you see does not exist. What you cannot see is truth.
m15206.plot: An ancient urn is found in a cemetery outside Rome.

m16395.title: Inferno (1980)
m16395.tagline: Come face to face with Hell.
m16395.plot: A young man returns from Rome to his sister's satanic New York apartment house.

m20115.title: Opera
m20115.plot: A young opera singer is stalked by a deranged fan bent on killing the people associated with her to claim her for himself.

m29702.title: Tenebre
m29702.plot: A razor-wielding serial killer is on the loose, murdering those around Peter Neal, an American mystery author in Italy to promote his newest novel.

m404.title: The Straight Story
m404.tagline: A true story that proves a little determination goes a very, very long way.
m404.plot: Retired farmer and widower Alvin Straight learns one day that his distant brother Lyle has suffered a stroke and may not recover.

m483.title: Wild at Heart
m483.tagline: A wild and crazy love story.
m483.plot: Young lovers Sailor and Lula hit the road to start a new life together away from the wrath of Lula’s deranged, disapproving mother, who has hired a team of hitmen to cut the lovers’ surreal honeymoon short.

m638.title: Lost Highway
m638.tagline: A lost road on the edge of strange...
m638.plot: A tormented jazz musician finds himself lost in an enigmatic story involving murder, surveillance, gangsters, doppelgängers, and an impossible transformation inside a prison cell.

m1730.title: Inland Empire
m1730.plot: When actress Nikki Grace gets the lead role in a cursed film, her world becomes more and more surreal, blending realities and ideas of infidelity, reincarnation, and supernatural forces.

m1923.title: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk with Me
m1923.tagline: In a town like Twin Peaks, no one is innocent.
m1923.plot: In the questionable town of Deer Meadow, Washington, FBI Agent Desmond inexplicably disappears while hunting for the man who murdered a teen girl.

m528491.title: WHAT DID JACK DO?
m528491.plot: In a locked down train station, a homicide detective conducts an interview with a tormented monkey  who is suspected of murder.

m452522.title: Twin Peaks (1989)
m452522.plot: An idiosyncratic FBI agent investigates the murder of a young woman in the even more idiosyncratic town of Twin Peaks.

m150.title: 48 Hrs.
m150.tagline: One cop. One con. No mercy.
m150.plot: A hard-nosed cop reluctantly teams up with a wise-cracking criminal temporarily paroled to him, in order to track down a killer.

m10384.title: Supernova
m10384.tagline: All hell is about to break loose.
m10384.plot: Set in the 22nd century, when a battered salvage ship sends out a distress signal, the seasoned crew of the rescue hospital ship Nova-17 responds.

m2153.title: The Driver
m2153.tagline: To break the driver, the cop was willing to break the law.
